description: Thresholds for the Guardrail on-chain monitoring gate

deny_on_active_alert.description: Deny when any active alert on the target has a severity in deny_alert_severities

deny_alert_severities.description: Lowercased severity strings that trigger a deny (e.g. ['critical','high'])

max_alert_age_seconds.description: Maximum allowed age (seconds) for the oldest active alert. Beyond this, alert data itself is treated as stale and the deposit denies.

min_health_score.description: Minimum acceptable Guardrail health score. Only enforced when health_available is true.
